zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Woodville於1407年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾葛拉芙頓 雷吉時，她的父親Sir Richard Woodville22歲，母親Joan Bedlisgate17歲。她和Sir John Pashley Sr至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1453年在英國越可爾享年46歲，埋葬在英國越可爾朋特福拉可特 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Woodville was born in 1407, in Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Woodville, was 22 and her mother, Joan Bedlisgate, was 17. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Sir John Pashley Sr. She died in 1453, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Pontefract Castle, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Woodville est née en 1407, à Grafton Regis, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Woodville, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan Bedlisgate, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Sir John Pashley Sr. Elle est décédée en 1453, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Pontefract Castle, Everwyck, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Woodvilleが1407年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグラフトン レジスで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Woodvilleは22歳，母Joan Bedlisgateは17歳であった。彼女はSir John Pashley Srとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1453年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで46歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアポンテフラクト カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Woodville(이)가 1407년 영국 노르섬프토실르 그라프턴 레지스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Woodville(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Bedlisgate(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Pashley Sr(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1453년 영국 요르크실르에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 폰테프라크트 카스틀에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Woodville родилась в 1407 г. в местности графтон регис, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Woodville было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Bedlisgate, 17. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Sir John Pashley Sr. Она умерла в 1453 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности понтефракт кастл, еркшир, Англия.
